title: 5.0 Banking and Finance
description: Quiz covering Unit 5 of Grade 10 Economics: financial intermediaries, financial markets, financial institutions, history of banks in Ethiopia, micro-finance, e-banking, and indigenous financial institutions.

questions.question: What is a financial intermediary?
options: An entity that acts as the middleman between two parties in a financial transaction
An entity that prints currency for the central bank
An entity that collects taxes for the government
An entity that regulates international trade
questions.correctAnswer: An entity that acts as the middleman between two parties in a financial transaction

questions.question: What is the transfer of funds from surplus spending units to deficit spending units through financial intermediaries called?
What do financial markets provide channels for?
What is the maturity period of money market instruments at the time of issuance?
Which of the following is a money market instrument?
Which of the following is a type of capital market security?
According to the textbook, what are institutions?
options: Buildings where financial transactions take place
Legal contracts between borrowers and lenders
Norms that organize social, political and economic relations
questions.correctAnswer: Norms that organize social, political and economic relations

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a depositary institution?
Which type of financial institution includes insurance companies and pension funds?
Which of the following is an example of a non-bank financial institution?
In Ethiopia, modern banking started in which year?
What was the name of the first modern bank in Ethiopia?
The Bank of Abyssinia was established based on an agreement with which bank?
In which year was the Bank of Abyssinia liquidated?
Which bank became the first independent bank of Ethiopia under total government control?
The State Bank of Ethiopia was established in 1943 as which type of bank?
In 1963, the State Bank of Ethiopia was split into which two banks?
options: Bank of Abyssinia and Bank of Ethiopia
Development Bank of Ethiopia and Commercial Bank of Ethiopia
Addis Bank and Bank of Abyssinia
National Bank of Ethiopia and Commercial Bank of Ethiopia
questions.correctAnswer: National Bank of Ethiopia and Commercial Bank of Ethiopia

questions.question: The National Bank of Ethiopia was established by which of the following proclamations?
In which year was Addis Bank merged into the Commercial Bank of Ethiopia?
What were the three dominant banks in Ethiopia during the Socialist period from 1974 to 1991?
options: Addis Bank, Banco di Roma, and Banco di Napoli
Bank of Abyssinia, Bank of Ethiopia, and State Bank
CBE, DBE, and Bank of Abyssinia

questions.question: What is the main objective of the National Bank of Ethiopia in controlling the financial sector?
options: Bringing price stability or controlling inflation
Issuing loans to the general public
questions.correctAnswer: Bringing price stability or controlling inflation

questions.question: Which bank in Ethiopia is engaged in providing short, medium and long term development credits with a project based lending tradition?
Who came up with the Nobel Prize winning idea of microfinancing and microcredit?
What is a microcredit?
options: A credit card issued by a commercial bank
A small credit given to a client by a microfinance institution
A large loan given to a corporation for expansion
A government bond for infrastructure projects
questions.correctAnswer: A small credit given to a client by a microfinance institution

questions.question: In group lending, what serves as the collateral?
options: Land titles owned by the group

questions.question: The clients of microfinance institutions are referred to as:
By the year 2020/21, how many Microfinance Institutions were operational in Ethiopia?
Electronic banking is also known as:
Which of the following is one of the three key aspects of electronic banking?
What does an automated teller machine allow customers to complete basic transactions without?
options: The aid of a branch representative or a teller
questions.correctAnswer: The aid of a branch representative or a teller

questions.question: What is the indigenous Ethiopian saving club called?
Which of the following groups of people participate in Iqqub?
options: People from all walks of life from rural poor to urban rich
questions.correctAnswer: People from all walks of life from rural poor to urban rich

questions.question: Membership in the Iqqub is based on which of the following?
Savings and Credit Co-operatives in Ethiopia are designated as which type of financial institutions?
When were the oldest Savings and Credit Co-operatives in Ethiopia established?
